title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Groww

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Groww
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
